caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green top with pink floral embroidery and a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom left corner of each shot, a small circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth open and her expression focused. She uses hand gestures to emphasize her points; initially, her right hand is raised and open, then she moves her right hand across her chest, and finally, she begins to move both hands outward as she continues talking. The lighting remains consistent, focusing on her face and upper body while the surrounding environment remains completely dark.
